Class EffectRenderer

java.lang.Object
renderer.EffectRenderer
public class EffectRenderer extends Object
Draws particle-based visual effects for the three status effects: Burn, Freeze, and Wind.

Each status effect has:

  • An overlay highlight drawn over the affected character's sprite.
  • A pool of short-lived EffectRenderer.Particle instances emitted and updated every frame.
Called each frame by GameRenderer.render().

    Method

    void
    draw()
    Draws all active status-effect overlays and particles for one frame.
    void
    reset()
    Clears all live particles — called when a new match starts.

  • Constructor Details

    • EffectRenderer

      public EffectRenderer(javafx.scene.canvas.GraphicsContext gc, Controller controller)
      Parameters:
      gc - canvas context to draw on
      controller - game-logic hub used to query active status effects

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Clears all live particles — called when a new match starts.

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws all active status-effect overlays and particles for one frame. Only draws an effect if its corresponding player number is non-zero.
